text: bishenat shetayim ledareyavesh hamelekh bachodesh hashishi beyovm echad lachodesh haya devar-yehva beyad-chagay hanavi el-zerubavel ben-shealetiel pachat yehuda veel-yehovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl lemor
ko amar yehva tsevaovt lemor ha'am haze ameru lo 'et-bo 'et-beyt yehva lehibanovt f
vayehi devar-yehva beyad-chagay hanavi lemor
ha'et lakhem atem lashevet bevateykhem sefunim vehabayit haze charev
ve'ata ko amar yehva tsevaovt simu levavekhem 'al-darekheykhem
zera'etem harebe vehave me'at akhovl veeyn-lesave'a shatov veeyn-leshakhera lavovsh veeyn-lechom lov vehamisetaker misetaker el-tserovr naquv f
ko amar yehva tsevaovt simu levavekhem 'al-darekheykhem
'alu hahar vahavetem 'ets uvenu habayit veeretseh-bov veekaved kh veekaveda q amar yehva
pano el-harebe vehine lime'at vahavetem habayit venafacheti vov ya'an me neum yehva tsevaovt ya'an beyti asher-hu charev veatem ratsim ish leveytov
'al-ken 'aleykhem kaleu shamayim mital vehaarets kalea yevulah
vaeqera chorev 'al-haarets ve'al-heharim ve'al-hadagan ve'al-hatirovsh ve'al-hayitsehar ve'al asher tovtsi haadama ve'al-haadam ve'al-habehema ve'al kal-yegi'a kapayim s

vayishema' zerubavel ׀ ben-shaletiel vihovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl vekhol ׀ sheerit ha'am beqovl yehva eloheyhem ve'al-diverey chagay hanavi kaasher shelachov yehva eloheyhem vayireu ha'am mipeney yehva
vayomer chagay maleakh yehva bemaleakhut yehva la'am lemor ani itekhem neum-yehva

vaya'ar yehva et-rucha zerubavel ben-shaletiel pachat yehuda veet-rucha yehovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl veet-rucha kol sheerit ha'am vayavou vaya'asu melakha beveyt-yehva tsevaovt eloheyhem f
beyovm 'eserim veareba'a lachodesh bashishi bishenat shetayim ledareyavesh hamelekh
bashevi'i be'eserim veechad lachodesh haya devar-yehva beyad-chagay hanavi lemor
emar-na el-zerubavel ben-shaletiel pachat yehuda veel-yehovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl veel-sheerit ha'am lemor
mi vakhem hanishear asher raa et-habayit haze bikhevovdov harishovn uma atem roim otov 'ata halov khamohu keayin be'eyneykhem
ve'ata chazaq zerubavel ׀ neum-yehva vachazaq yehovshu'a ben-yehovtsadaq hakohen hagadovl vachazaq kal-'am haarets neum-yehva va'asu ki-ani itekhem neum yehva tsevaovt
et-hadavar asher-karati itekhem betsetekhem mimitserayim veruchi 'omedet betovkhekhem al-tirau s
ki kho amar yehva tsevaovt 'ovd achat me'at hi vaani mare'ish et-hashamayim veet-haarets veet-hayam veet-hecharava
vehire'asheti et-kal-hagovyim uvau chemedat kal-hagovyim umileti et-habayit haze kavovd amar yehva tsevaovt
li hakesef veli hazahav neum yehva tsevaovt
gadovl yiheye kevovd habayit haze haacharovn min-harishovn amar yehva tsevaovt uvamaqovm haze eten shalovm neum yehva tsevaovt f
be'eserim veareba'a lateshi'i bishenat shetayim ledareyavesh haya devar-yehva el-chagay hanavi lemor
ko amar yehva tsevaovt sheal-na et-hakohanim tovra lemor
hen ׀ yisa-ish besar-qodesh bikhenaf bigedov venaga' bikhenafov el-halechem veel-hanazid veel-hayayin veel-shemen veel-kal-maakhal hayiqedash vaya'anu hakohanim vayomeru lo
vayomer chagay im-yiga' teme-nefesh bekhal-ele hayitema vaya'anu hakohanim vayomeru yitema
vaya'an chagay vayomer ken ha'am-haze vekhen-hagovy haze lefanay neum-yehva vekhen kal-ma'ase yedeyhem vaasher yaqerivu sham tame hu
ve'ata simu-na levavekhem min-hayovm haze vama'ela miterem sum-even el-even beheykhal yehva
miheyovtam ba el-'aremat 'eserim vehayeta 'asara ba el-hayeqev lachesof chamishim pura vehayeta 'eserim
hikeyti etekhem bashidafovn uvayeraqovn uvabarad et kal-ma'ase yedeykhem veeyn-etekhem elay neum-yehva
simu-na levavekhem min-hayovm haze vama'ela miyovm 'eserim veareba'a lateshi'i lemin-hayovm asher-yusad heykhal-yehva simu levavekhem
ha'ovd hazera' bamegura ve'ad-hagefen vehateena veharimovn ve'ets hazayit lo nasa min-hayovm haze avarekh s
vayehi devar-yehva ׀ shenit el-chagay be'eserim veareba'a lachodesh lemor
emor el-zerubavel pachat-yehuda lemor ani mare'ish et-hashamayim veet-haarets
vehafakheti kise mamelakhovt vehishemadeti chozeq mamelekhovt hagovyim vehafakheti merekava verokheveyha veyaredu susim verokheveyhem ish becherev achiv
bayovm hahu neum-yehva tsevaovt eqachakha zerubavel ben-shealetiel 'avedi neum-yehva vesametikha kachovtam ki-vekha vachareti neum yehva tsevaovt
